class.name: Alchemist
class.description: Whether their methods are explosive,transformative, or restorative, Alchemists transmute the world around them totheirliking.

level_1.name: Bombs
level_1.description: Youcan create volatile alchemical Bombs. They are Martial Ranged weapons (1d10 Fire+ Dex, Range 30/90, Finesse, Thrown, Destructible, Mastery:Explode).

subfeatures.name: Bomb Mastery
subfeatures.description: You haveproficiency with Bombs and can use the Explode masteryproperty.

subfeatures.name: Priming Bombs
subfeatures.description: When taking the Attackaction, you can prime a Bomb to add your Intelligence modifier to damage. Damageincreases at levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).

level_1.name: Reagents
level_1.description: You have a pool of reagents used tobrew potions and empower Bombs. You regain one on a Short Rest and all on a LongRest.

subfeatures.name: Empowered Bomb
subfeatures.description: Expend reagents(up to PB) to add 1d10 damage per reagent. Can also increase explosion radiusby 5ft per reagent.

level_1.name: Potion Brewing
level_1.description: Spend 10 minutesand reagents to brew potions (max total = Int modifier). Potions become inertafter a Long Rest. You can distill existing potions to recoverreagents.

level_2.name: Bomb Formulae
level_2.description: Learn 3 formulaeto apply special effects to Bombs. Can replace one formula on a LongRest.

level_2.name: Reagent Synthesis
level_2.description: Once per Long Rest, regainreagents equal to Int modifier (min 1) on a ShortRest.

level_3.name: Alchemist Subclass
level_3.description: Choose asubclass that grants features at levels 3, 6, 10,and 14.

level_5.name: Discoveries
level_5.description: Gain a discovery fromthe Discovery Options list. Gain more at higherlevels.

level_7.name: Evasion
level_7.description: When you make a Dex savefor half damage, you take no damage on success and half onfailure.

level_11.name: Blast Coating
level_11.description: Automaticallysucceed on saves against your own Bombs and take no damage fromthem.

level_15.name: Potion Mixologist
level_15.description: Mix two potionsand drink them as a Bonus Action, gaining botheffects.

level_18.name: Experimentalist
level_18.description: On a Long Rest,replace any Bomb Formulae and one Discovery.

level_19.name: EpicBoon
level_19.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat or another feat for which youqualify.

level_20.name: Philosopher's Stone
level_20.description: Gain astone providing: Regenerating Reagents (regain up to 6 on Initiative), QuickBrewing (Utilize action), and Longevity (age 1 year forevery 10).

level_20.name: Nuclear Bomb
level_20.description: Formula: Replace explosivecontents with Philosopher's Stone. Deals 10d10 + 100 Force damage in a 1-mileradius. Destroys thestone.

subclasses.name: Amorist
subclasses.description: Brewers of lovepotions and practitioners of mind-affectingalchemy.

features.name: Charmer
features.description: Proficiency inDeception and Persuasion; can use Intelligence for these checks. Can brewPhilter of Love for 1 Reagent.

features.name: Pheromone Bomb[Formula]
features.description: Bomb deals no damage but forces a Wisdom save or thetarget is Charmed.

features.name: MagneticPersonality
features.description: Take the Influence action as a BonusAction.

features.name: Beguiling Perfume
features.description: Enemieswithin 5ft must pass a Wisdom save to attack you or lose theattack.

features.name: Alchemical Romance
features.description: Expend 1-4Reagents to improve Pheromone Bomb with effects: Dreamy Haze, Extended Charm,Ignore Immunity, or ToxicLove.

features.name: Physician'sStudies
features.description: Proficiency in Medicine; add Intelligence modifier toMedicine checks.

features.name: Painkiller Bomb[Formula]
features.description: Bomb deals no damage but grants Temporary HP equal toAlchemist level. Can use Empowered Bomb to increase TempHP.

features.name: Concentrated Healing
features.description: When a creaturedrinks your potion, replace up to half the dice with the highest possiblenumber.

features.name: Self-Medication
features.description: Advantage onsaving throws until the end of your next turn after drinking a healingpotion.

features.name: Alchemical Resurrection
features.description: Mixdiamond dust (1,000 GP) into a healing potion to create a Potion of Resurrection(Raise Dead effect).

subclasses.name: Dynamo Engineer
subclasses.description: Casts spellsby preparing them in devices known as SpellDynamos.

features.name: Spectrum Analyzer
features.description: CastDetect Magic once per Short/Long Rest without a slot.

features.name: SpellDynamos
features.description: Cast Wizard spells using handheld devices. Uses aspecific spellcasting table for slots and preparedspells.

features.name: Arcano Bomb [Formula]
features.description: Expend aSpell Dynamo to change Bomb to Force damage, use d12s, and add an extra die ofdamage.

features.name: Counter-Discharge
features.description: Reaction: Expenda Spell Dynamo to gain Advantage and Resistance against a spell castwithin 60ft.

features.name: Arcane Recycler
features.description: Reaction:Capture a spell targeting you into an expended Spell Dynamo.

features.name: Blasting Specialty
features.description: Bombsdeal double damage to objects and structures.

features.name: Black PowderBomb [Formula]
features.description: Bomb uses d12s and bypasses Fire Resistance(Immunity becomes Resistance).

features.name: TimedDemolition
features.description: Set a duration (up to 10 mins) for a Bomb'sdetonation.

features.name: Blast Shield
features.description: Gain Resistanceto one elemental damage type, changeable on a Short/LongRest.

features.name: Overloaded Charge
features.description: When expendingreagents equal to PB to empower a bomb, gain 2 additional reagents for furtherempowerment.

subclasses.name: Mutagenist
subclasses.description: Transmutes their body withexperimental, injected mutagens.

features.name: BonusProficiencies
features.description: Proficiency in Acrobatics orAthletics.

features.name: Mutagens
features.description: Bonus Action: Injectyourself for 1 minute to increase Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution scoreby 3 (max 23) and gain secondary benefits.

features.name: SharedMutagen
features.description: Bonus Action: Expend 1 Reagent to inject an allywithin 5ft with a Mutagen.

features.name: AdvancedMutation
features.description: Gain an additional mutation when using a Mutagen:Hyperelastic, Mucilaginous, or Polybrachia.

features.name: MutatedBlood
features.description: Permanent +2 to Str, Dex, or Con (max 22). Max increasesto 25 when Mutagen is applied.

subclasses.name: Ooze Rancher
subclasses.description: Breedsand commands all manner of Oozes andslimes.

features.name: Ooze Resilience
features.description: AcidResistance and Ooze Empathy (Oozes must save or miss attacks againstyou).

features.name: Slime Bomb [Formula]
features.description: Bomb deals nodamage but coats targets in slime, preventing Bonus Actions and certainactions.

features.name: Bottled Oozes
features.description: Spend 2 Reagents tocreate a Bottled Ooze (Gray Ooze). Higher levels allow Ochre Jelly, GelatinousCube, and Black Pudding.

features.name: SacrificialSlime
features.description: Reaction: Command an allied ooze within 5ft to take anattack meant for you.

features.name: ElementalOozes
features.description: Grant a Bottled Ooze immunity to an element; it heals fromthat damage type.

features.name: Poisoner
features.description: Gain Alchemyof Poison discovery; ignore level 5 prerequisite.

features.name: LaughingGas Bombs
features.description: Gain the formula (improved damage d10s andSide-Splitter effect).

features.name: AlchemicalAssassin
features.description: Bonus Action: Deal 1 piercing damage and apply poisonvia needle ring. Advantage on checks to conceal thering.

features.name: Mithridatism
features.description: Immunity to Poisondamage and the Poisoned condition.

features.name: ToxicRecompense
features.description: Reaction: Unleash poisonous vapor when hit by a meleeattack.

subclasses.name: Xenoalchemist
subclasses.description: Modifies their body and thebodies of others with monstersurgery.

features.name: Xenobiology
features.description: Proficiencyin Arcana, Nature, or Medicine. Advantage to identifymonsters.

features.name: Mad Scientist
features.description: Gain two monstrousgrafts. Use Intelligence for graft-improved UnarmedStrikes.

features.name: Sleep Bomb [Formula]
features.description: Bomb deals nodamage but forces Wisdom saves against Incapacitated and Unconsciousconditions.

features.name: Surgical Strike
features.description: Study action asa Bonus Action to learn target's AC, Immunities, Resistances, or Bloodiedstatus.

features.name: Necromantic Organs
features.description: When reducedto 0 HP, drop to HP equal to Alchemist level instead. Once per LongRest.

features.name: It's Alive!
features.description: Create an Alchemy Golemfrom 3 Humanoid corpses.
